label: AWS CLI
description: Compress AWS CLI progress output while preserving errors and completed transfers.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Completed 1.0 MiB/2.0 MiB
upload: ./app.log to s3://bucket/app.log
An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the PutObject operation: denied
tests.expected:
upload: ./app.log to s3://bucket/app.log
An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the PutObject operation: denied

label: Biome
description: Compact Biome lint/format output.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Checked 10 files in 20ms
error lint/a.ts:1:1 boom
Fixed 1 file
tests.expected:
error lint/a.ts:1:1 boom
Fixed 1 file

label: ESLint
description: Keep lint diagnostics and problem summary.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
/repo/a.ts
  1:1  error  boom  no-boom
✖ 1 problem (1 error, 0 warnings)
tests.expected:
/repo/a.ts
  1:1  error  boom  no-boom
✖ 1 problem (1 error, 0 warnings)

label: TypeScript
description: Keep TypeScript diagnostics and file locations.

tests.name: inline sample

src/a.ts:1:1 - error TS2322: Type string is not assignable
Found 1 error.
tests.expected:
src/a.ts:1:1 - error TS2322: Type string is not assignable
Found 1 error.

✓ 10 modules transformed.
✓ built in 100ms

compiled with 1 error

description: Strip bundle install noise and keep final status.

Using rake 13.0
Installing pg 1.5
Bundle complete! 4 Gemfile dependencies

label: Composer (PHP)
description: Keep Composer install/update results, warnings, and dependency errors.

patterns: Your requirements could not be resolved

includePatterns: Your requirements could not be resolved

errorPatterns: Your requirements could not be resolved

tests.name: successful install
tests.input:
Loading composer repositories with package information
Updating dependencies
Lock file operations: 5 installs, 0 updates, 0 removals
  - Locking laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
Writing lock file
Installing dependencies from lock file (including require-dev)
Package operations: 5 installs, 0 updates, 0 removals
  - Downloading laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
  - Installing laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
Generating optimized autoload files
tests.expected:
Package operations: 5 installs, 0 updates, 0 removals
  - Installing laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
Generating optimized autoload files

tests.name: dependency conflict
tests.input:
Your requirements could not be resolved to an installable set of packages.

  Problem 1
    - laravel/framework[v11.0.0] requires php ^8.2 but your php version (8.1.0) does not satisfy that requirement.
tests.expected:
Your requirements could not be resolved to an installable set of packages.
  Problem 1
    - laravel/framework[v11.0.0] requires php ^8.2 but your php version (8.1.0) does not satisfy that requirement.

label: curl
description: Remove curl progress noise and keep HTTP status/errors.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
% Total    % Received
  0     0    0     0
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
curl: (22) The requested URL returned error: 500
tests.expected:
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
curl: (22) The requested URL returned error: 500

label: df
description: Keep filesystem usage table headers and mounted filesystems.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
udev            2.0G     0  2.0G   0% /dev
/dev/sda1        50G   45G  5.0G  90% /
tests.expected:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1        50G   45G  5.0G  90% /

label: Docker Build
description: Keep Docker build errors and final summary while stripping layer-by-layer progress.

includePatterns: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon

tests.name: successful build
tests.input:
Step 1/3 : FROM node:20
Step 2/3 : COPY . /app
Step 3/3 : RUN npm install
 ---> Running in abc123
 ---> def456
Removing intermediate container abc123
Successfully built def456
Successfully tagged myapp:latest
tests.expected:
Step 1/3 : FROM node:20
Step 2/3 : COPY . /app
Step 3/3 : RUN npm install
Successfully built def456
Successfully tagged myapp:latest

tests.name: build failure
tests.input:
Step 1/2 : FROM node:20
Step 2/2 : RUN npm install
ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/sh -c npm install" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
tests.expected:
Step 1/2 : FROM node:20
Step 2/2 : RUN npm install
ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/sh -c npm install" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1

tests.name: preserves buildkit-prefixed RUN step errors
tests.input:
#8 [build 3/4] RUN npm run build
#8 0.456 src/a.ts:1:1 - ERROR TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable
#8 0.789 npm ERR! exit code 1
#8 ERROR: process "/bin/sh -c npm run build" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
tests.expected:
#8 0.456 src/a.ts:1:1 - ERROR TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable
#8 0.789 npm ERR! exit code 1
#8 ERROR: process "/bin/sh -c npm run build" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1

label: Docker Logs
description: Keep warnings/errors and recent Docker log context.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Attaching to api
INFO started
INFO started
ERROR failed to connect
tests.expected:
INFO started
ERROR failed to connect

description: Keep docker container table header and rows under a fixed cap.

abc123         node    "npm start"
tests.expected:

description: Summarize disk-usage listings while preserving largest entries.

120M node_modules
120M node_modules
tests.expected:

120M node_modules
120M node_modules

label: Error Stacktrace
description: Collapse stack traces while preserving error text and top frames.

    at fn (/repo/a.ts:1:1)
    at fn (/repo/a.ts:1:1)
Caused by: bad
tests.expected:
Error: boom
    at fn (/repo/a.ts:1:1)
Caused by: bad

description: Compress Google Cloud CLI output and preserve actionable errors.

ERROR: (gcloud.run.deploy) PERMISSION_DENIED: denied

label: Generic Output
description: Fallback filter for unknown command output.

Error: boom

Traceback (most recent call last):
  file.py:1
tests.expected:
Error: boom
Traceback (most recent call last):
  file.py:1

label: GitHub CLI
description: Keep GitHub CLI command results, errors, and PR/issue summaries while stripping pagination noise. Skips `gh api` and `--json` invocations (structured output that would be corrupted by line filtering).

tests.name: pr create
tests.input:
Creating pull request for feat/foo into main in owner/repo

https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/123
tests.expected:
Creating pull request for feat/foo into main in owner/repo
https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/123

tests.name: auth error
tests.input: error: must be authenticated to use this command
tests.expected: error: must be authenticated to use this command

tests.name: skips gh api (structured JSON output)
skips --json output (would corrupt structured data)

label: Git Branch
description: Compact git branch/switch output.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
main
* feature/rtk
  release
tests.expected:
main
* feature/rtk
  release

label: Git Diff
description: Drop low-signal diff metadata while preserving files, hunks, and changed lines.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
diff --git a/a.ts b/a.ts
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-console.log("old")
+console.log("new")
tests.expected:
diff --git a/a.ts b/a.ts
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-console.log("old")
+console.log("new")

label: Git Log
description: Keep commit identifiers and subjects from verbose logs.

tests.name: inline sample

commit abcdef1234567890
Author: Dev <dev@example.com>
Date: today

    feat: add rtk
tests.expected:
commit abcdef1234567890
    feat: add rtk

	modified: src/app.ts
nothing added to commit
tests.expected:
On branch main
Changes not staged for commit:
	modified: src/app.ts

NAME       READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
api-7d8    1/1     Running            0          2h
web-2c4    0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   5          12m
db-9f1     1/1     Running            0          2h
tests.expected:
NAME       READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
web-2c4    0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   5          12m

deployment "api" successfully rolled out

2026-05-28T10:00:01 INFO request handled

label: Terraform Plan
description: Keep plan actions and summary while stripping refresh noise.

Terraform will perform the following actions:
  # aws_instance.web will be created

tests.expected:
Terraform will perform the following actions:
  # aws_instance.web will be created
Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.

description: Keep Cargo test failures and final summary.

running 2 tests
test a ... ok
test b ... FAILED
failures:

thread b panicked at boom
test result: FAILED. 1 passed; 1 failed
tests.expected:
running 2 tests
test b ... FAILED
failures:
---- b stdout ----
thread b panicked at boom
test result: FAILED. 1 passed; 1 failed

description: Keep failing Go tests and package summaries.

=== RUN TestA
--- FAIL: TestA (0.00s)
    a_test.go:1: boom
FAIL	./pkg	0.1s

--- FAIL: TestA (0.00s)
    a_test.go:1: boom
FAIL	./pkg	0.1s

description: Keep Jest failures and summary while removing passing noise.

FAIL src/b.test.ts

Tests: 1 failed, 1 passed
tests.expected:
FAIL src/b.test.ts
Test Suites: 1 failed, 1 passed
Tests: 1 failed, 1 passed

================ 1 failed, 2 passed ================

FAILED tests/test_a.py::test_a - AssertionError
E assert 1 == 2
================ 1 failed, 2 passed ================

description: Keep failing suites, failed tests, stack headers, and final summary.

Test Files 1 failed | 1 passed
Tests 1 failed | 1 passed

Error: boom
Test Files 1 failed | 1 passed
Tests 1 failed | 1 passed
